sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60110" key="krombo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρομβόω</orth>, <sense id="n60110.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roast</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χοιρίδια κ. ὅλα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:90" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">90</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
